-To emerge

 To prance, to spring up, rear, jump up ngựa cất vó chồm lên the horse raised its hooves and pranced ô tô chồm qua ổ gà the car sprang over the pot-hole đang nằm hoảng hốt chồm dậy he was lying when he sprang up in bewilderment 
 To emerge thú tính trong người nó chồm dậy bestiality in him emerged
